description: Identifies upward momentum and suggests buying dips below a certain threshold.
profit_rationale: Based on historical trends showing strong bounce-backs after minor pullbacks.

description: Focuses on quick, small gains from strong short-term momentum indicators.
profit_rationale: Scalping relies on frequent, small profits to accumulate over time.

description: Analyzes recent news sentiment and suggests trades based on overwhelmingly positive or negative sentiment shifts.
profit_rationale: Positive sentiment historically correlates with short-term price increases.

description: Identifies established trends and aims to follow them for larger gains.
profit_rationale: Riding established trends can lead to significant profits, accepting larger drawdowns.

description: Targets short-term volatility by scalping small price movements in highly liquid assets.
profit_rationale: Exploits intraday price fluctuations common in volatile markets.
